---
title: "Home"
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
<p class="eyebrow">Ph.D. Candidate</p>
# Dong-Joon Yi {.hero-title}

<p class="hero-subtitle">
I investigate defect-physics based on spectroscopy and explainable AI for Advanced electronic and photonic devices.
</p>

<div class="hero-actions">
  <a class="action-link" href="research.html">Research</a>
  <a class="action-link" href="publications.html">Publications</a>
  <a class="action-link" href="assets/CV.pdf">2-page CV</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.info-grid}
::: {.info-card}
### Defect Spectroscopy
Energy-level extraction and trap-density quantification using DLTS, PICTS, Raman/PL, and interface-sensitive analysis.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Explainable AI for Experiments
Interpretation-focused models that connect spectral and electrical features to physically meaningful mechanisms.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Device Translation
Device characterization and simulation workflows that turn defect-level findings into engineering guidance.
:::
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Current Position {.section-title}

- Ph.D. candidate, Semiconductor Nanophotonics Laboratory (SNLab), Hanyang University
- Advisor: Prof. Mun Seok Jeong
- Focus: Defect physics, interpretable data analysis, and advanced device structures
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Contact {.section-title}

- Personal Email: [iver.ydj@gmail.com](mailto:iver.ydj@gmail.com)
- Academic Email: [iverydj@hanyang.ac.kr](mailto:iverydj@hanyang.ac.kr)
- Department: [Department of Electronic Engineering, Hanyang University](https://ee.hanyang.ac.kr/)
- Google Scholar: <https://scholar.google.co.kr/citations?user=MZE2mWsAAAAJ&hl=ko&oi=ao>
- Full CV (Google Docs): <https://docs.google.com/document/d/1lrk7ocGFDo48wUvRRMkrh3YgPosDd4Yo/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=104466598745421942872&rtpof=true&sd=true>
:::
